question: Can a monthly BTC/ETH spot rule that holds the stronger asset only when its own 90-day return is positive earn cost-adjusted returns across development, evaluation and confirmation with lower drawdown than a 0.5x two-asset allocation?
development_gate: data PASS; 90d base/stress >0; max drawdown >-35% and below benchmark; 60d/180d base >0; >=6 invested months; turnover <=30
evaluation_gate: 90d base/stress >0; max drawdown >-30% and below benchmark; 60d/180d base >0; >=6 invested months
confirmation_gate: 90d base/stress >=0; max drawdown >-25% and below benchmark; 60d/180d base >=0; evaluation+confirmation compounded >0
holdout_release_rule: fetch evaluation only after development pass; confirmation only after evaluation pass
